positive: A vibrant, stylized graphic illustration of a magical forest portal, rendered with thick, bold linework and negative space. The portal is a central glowing circle framed by ancient, stylized roots and whimsical, geometric flora. The color palette emphasizes deep teal, forest emerald, warm mustard yellow, and striking gold accents. Composition is symmetrical and centered, making it highly impactful for apparel printing. Style: Modern folk art meets Art Deco geometry. Lighting: Strong, ethereal luminescence emanating from the portal itself. High contrast, clean silhouettes, suitable for a repeatable, stylized print.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, grain, messy, cluttered, cartoonish, photorealistic
